info.description: Spec-driven AI development platform — orchestrates teams of Claude Code agents.
info.title: Foundry API

get.description: Returns all available agent role definitions from the agent library
Returns the health status of the Foundry API
Returns a paginated list of all projects

post.description: Creates a new project with the given details

get.description: Returns the project with the given ID

patch.description: Updates the name and/or description of a project

get.description: Returns all agents for the given project
Returns the agent with the given ID

post.description: Publishes a pause command for the given agent
Publishes a resume command for the given agent
Publishes pause commands for all agents in the project
Send a message to the PO agent for the project

delete.description: Close the active PO session for the project

post.description: Launch a PO estimation session for the project
Launch a PO planning session for the project

get.description: Check if a PO session is active for the project

post.description: Publishes resume commands for all agents in the project

get.description: Returns the risk profile for the given project; falls back to the global default

put.description: Updates the risk classification criteria and model routing for the given project

get.description: Returns the spec associated with the given project

put.description: Replaces the spec content for the given project; creates if none exists

post.description: Approves the spec for the given project; requires content and token estimate
Rejects the spec for the given project and returns the project to planning
Creates an agent and task, sets up workspace, and launches the claude process

get.description: Returns all tasks for the given project; optionally filter by status
Returns the task with the given ID
Returns token usage aggregated across all tasks for the given project
